context: Tests whether the agent applies the correct BFCM budget bump percentages, creative refresh cadence by funnel stage, and produces the required calendar format with always-on baseline, quarterly schedule, and coordination with Klaviyo email sends.

checklist.name: BFCM core budget bump
checklist.description: The BFCM core period (approximately Nov 28-Dec 2) shows a budget increase of +200% to +300% over baseline

checklist.name: Pre-BFCM budget bump
checklist.description: The pre-BFCM period (early-to-mid November) shows a budget increase of approximately +30%

checklist.name: Holiday gift budget bump
checklist.description: The December holiday gifting period shows a budget increase of approximately +50%

checklist.name: Cold creative refresh cadence
checklist.description: Cold acquisition creatives are scheduled to rotate every 2 weeks (not monthly, not weekly)

checklist.name: Retargeting creative refresh cadence
checklist.description: Retargeting creatives are scheduled to rotate every 3-4 weeks

checklist.name: BFCM creative cadence
checklist.description: BFCM-period creatives are described as always-fresh or refreshed daily/very frequently during BFCM week

checklist.name: Always-on baseline table
checklist.description: Output includes an always-on table listing campaigns with daily budget, audience, and creative cadence columns

checklist.name: Klaviyo coordination section
checklist.description: Output includes a section on coordinating paid ad pulses with email send dates for BFCM or holiday moments

checklist.name: Boxing Day or NYE budget
checklist.description: If December 26+ or New Year period is covered, a budget increase of +30-50% is noted (or budget drop in January)

checklist.name: Open questions section
checklist.description: Output includes an open questions section noting outstanding decisions (e.g., platform additions, creative direction questions)
